title: Validate and improve autopilot plugin autonomy mode
description: Assess the current OpenCode autopilot plugin against the user's autonomy goals, improve behavior gaps, and add a feasible PTY-based validation path.

title: Autopilot path discovery and behavioral audit
Investigate OpenCode question hook support
description: Research whether OpenCode exposes a general question/prompt hook or tool-interception path, document the current question flow, and draft a hook proposal if the API gap is confirmed.

title: Implement autonomous strength and aggressive prompt behavior
description: Autonomous strength implementation complete. Fixed README.md absolute path regression. All tests pass (68/68), typecheck clean. Ready for coordinator review and closure.

title: Add PTY-based autopilot validation
description: Blocked after repeated review failures. Current PTY/e2e work does not yet prove a genuine PTY-backed OpenCode autopilot run with verified plugin activation and required concrete side effects. Further work likely needs a different terminal-control approach and an explicit plugin-loading strategy for the spawned OpenCode session.

title: Retry PTY autopilot validation with PTY tooling
description: Now that PTY support is available, build or fix the e2e validation so it uses genuine PTY-backed execution, proves this repo's autopilot plugin is loaded in the spawned OpenCode session, and requires concrete workspace side effects from the real run.
